quizQuestion:
昔は新婚旅行といえばハワイだったが、{___}トルコやエジプトも珍しくない。
(Long ago, if mentioning honeymoon travel, you would think of Hawaii, but now Turkey and Egypt are also not unusual.)
pedagogicalNote: 次第に = gradually/little by little; 今では = by now/nowadays (implies change from before); ようになる = come to do (gradual change to new state)

quizQuestion:
毒魚ってなん{___}？
("Poison fish"- whadd'ya suppose they are?)
pedagogicalNote: そう(hearsay) = I heard; らしい = apparently/evidently; よう = seems like (speaker inference); みたい = looks like (casual); だろう = probably; であろう = formal probably; の様 = seems like (formal/written). Key distinction: information source and formality level
